name: Holograph-Bridge-Protocol
description: The Holograph Bridge Protocol - solidity smart contracts
author: thisisvitto

scripts.build-compile: rm -fr ./build ; mkdir ./build ; npm run-script build ; npm run-script compile
scripts.dev: rm -fr ./contracts ; mkdir contracts ; node scripts/build.js ; sh _build.sh
scripts.ganache-x2: rm -fr ./db ; rm -fr ./db2 ; mkdir ./db ; mkdir ./db2 ; rm ./keys.json ; rm ./keys2.json ; ganache-cli --accounts=10 --defaultBalanceEther=100 --deterministic --mnemonic="$(cat ./.mnemonic)" --port=8545 --hostname=0.0.0.0 --gasPrice=0 --gasLimit=10000000 --networkId=5777 --db=./db --acctKeys=./keys.json & ganache-cli --accounts=10 --defaultBalanceEther=100 --deterministic --mnemonic="$(cat ./.mnemonic)" --port=9545 --hostname=0.0.0.0 --gasPrice=0 --gasLimit=10000000 --networkId=5777 --db=./db2 --acctKeys=./keys2.json
